question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click 'Join Free' on the homepage, enter your email and password, verify your email via OTP, and choose whether you want to join as a listener or an artist.

question: Can I switch between listener and artist roles?
answer: Yes. This is possible by requesting the admin to switch roles.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen, enter your registered email, and we'll send you an OTP to reset your password.

question: Can I permanently delete my account?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account. This permanently removes your profile and all uploaded content.

question: Is my personal information secure?
answer: Yes. MusicMenia uses encrypted authentication and secure cloud infrastructure to keep your data safe. We never sell user data to third parties.

question: What audio formats can I upload?
answer: We currently support MP3 audio files up to under 5MB per track.

question: Can I  delete a track after uploading?
answer: Yes. Go to Dashboard → My Tracks and choose  Delete music to manage your uploaded tracks.

question: Why was my track rejected?
answer: Tracks may be rejected due to copyright violations, poor audio quality, or incomplete metadata.

question: Can listeners stream music for free?
answer: Yes. MusicMenia is completely free for listeners. Stream tracks, follow artists, and discover new music without any subscription.

question: How does audio compression work on upload?
answer: When you upload a track, MusicMenia automatically compresses the audio to optimize file size while maintaining good playback quality. but This featur is on pending and will be implemented in the future updates.

question: How do I upload my music?
answer: Go to your Artist Dashboard → Upload Music. Add your track title, thumbnail, and MP3 file, then publish.

question: How do I get my music on the Local Feed?
answer: Once your track is approved, it automatically appears on the Local Feed for listeners to discover.

question: Can I upload cover songs?
answer: Yes. Cover songs are allowed when proper licensing is provided during upload.

question: How do I follow an artist?
answer: Visit an artist's profile and click the Follow button to receive updates about their new releases.

question: Can I share tracks outside the app?
answer: Yes. Every track includes a shareable link that works across social media and messaging apps.

question: How do I report inappropriate content?
answer: Open the three-dot menu on any track or profile and select Report. Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours.

question: Does MusicMenia support dark mode?
answer: Yes. You can switch between light and dark themes anytime from your profile settings.

question: Is MusicMenia available on mobile?
answer: Yes. MusicMenia is fully responsive and works on smartphones, tablets, and desktop browsers.

question: Do I get email notifications?
answer: Yes. MusicMenia sends email notifications for account verification, OTP, login activity, logout, new music drops from followed artists, and password reset confirmations.
